title: regression: podman run --privileged: runs as container_t
body:
```
# podman run --rm --privileged --userns=host alpine cat /proc/self/attr/current
system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c125,c328       <<< expected spc_t
```
podman-0.9.3.1-1.git1cd906d.fc28 and .fc29.

Note that running with `--security-opt label=disable` still works as expected (`spc_t`).
